title: career-ops.posting.evaluated v1
description: Emitted by career-ops when a scanned job posting is scored against the user's capability profile and written to data/applications.md as a new 'Evaluated' row with its dossier report. Consumers use this to track evaluation throughput and score distribution across the pipeline.

company.description: Company name, matching the Company column in data/applications.md.

role_title.description: Role title, matching the Role column in data/applications.md.

status.description: Canonical applications.md state assigned as a result of this evaluation.

recommendation.description: Recommended next action derived from the score threshold (below 4.0/5 is discouraged per career-ops policy).

tracker_row.description: The '#' row number assigned in data/applications.md.

report.description: Relative path to the generated dossier/report file, e.g. reports/003-grafana-labs-2026-06-26.md.

gaps.description: Notable capability gaps identified during scoring (e.g. 'Go primary lang gap').
